feedback.text: Hello! I believe this is a great opportunity to include "Stop Killing Games" in EU laws. It's not okay with me that big video game studios sell games and then stop supporting them after a few years without offering any replacements. I personally owned two of these games, and both were removed from my library. This means that both the games and the money I spent on them were gone. The EU should hold game studios accountable for this so that they are incentivized to change their practices.
